video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 15 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: the last day of the second week of the jedi italia would see the riders return to the mountains and at the northeast of the country in friuli the karnik alps the destination beginning in an air force base in rivolto and heading up four categorized climbs three second cats and a finale at pian cavallo the scene of victories for marco pantani in 1998 and three years previous mike 185 kilometers almost 4 000 meters of climbing and a big day in the fight for the mayarosa the zhouwal made a beginning with a 56 second lead and the italian version of the red arrows the freccia tricolori began the day eleven men would get up the road beginning with ten in a bit of a fight because while we style were trying to get their second man in the break in the end he would make it that would be sergio samitier the breakaway though would get no more than seven minutes really ruben gahejo had tried but would fail to get in the breakaway samitia the only man managing to get across with 122 kilometers to go the break was looking good first king of the mountains climb was won by gerani visconti who will take the malaya virtually on the road king of the mountains for now and gerhart forced to wait for another day some with an ntt would start riding though right never getting more than those almost seven minutes more problems for ntt behind sobrero going down an ntt forced to chase with a few injuries to boot dominican viva support team getting weaker as we headed into the valleys italian river crossed a few times and there'll be problems too for nikolai and yonatan narbaez se peter going down as well former two riders the worst off the break would start breaking up with 50 kilometers to go to kent dennis and visconti setting off the italians soon losing the wheel and dennis would then leave the kent behind on a long one with 46 kilometers to go realizing that the peloton was starting to bring back the advantage to around three some stunning scenery on the rare occasions that the clouds disappeared snow at the finish as well and on to the final climb dennis had just a minute and three seconds with somewhere really setting the pace dennis would be caught his teammate gagan hart looking good following the wheels not looking as good though vincenzo nibali who would be distanced raphael michael losing pace as well as was patrick comrade fullsang had also been distanced and then the majadoza jai hindley riding hard wilco kelderman following and at the finish it was a fight to see if the mallards could still be on the back of almeida but it was his former under-23 teammate tale gagan heart who won the stage taking a grand tour victory for the first time in his career five stages up for the ineos grenadiers and just about hanging onto the pink jersey chihuahua made it delight though for gagan hearts i'll made her absolutely exhausted a huge step forward in the career of tayo gegenhart the stage by two seconds from kelderman four from henley and almeida 37 keeping the margarota what a performance from the 22 year old portuguese 13 days now in the mayarosa 15 seconds his lead over kelderman henley up to third gegan hart fourth at less than three minutes could even threaten the podium he was on the podium as a stage winner gagan heart for the stage in the bag ineos have five they'll now be turning their attention to week three they might even think they can win the thing udine to san danielle stage 16 will see the giro d'italia resume for the final six days and the last week full of mountain tests another very difficult stage test towards the end 229 k's they resume after the rest day you
